choices.text: #[account(has_one = authority)] on the account; pub authority: Signer<'info> as separate field. Anchor verifies account.authority == authority.key() automatically. Cleaner than explicit constraint.

Associated Token Account (ATA): PDA derived from (owner, mint). associated_token::mint = mint + associated_token::authority = user constraints. Deterministic per (owner, mint) — recoverable + wallet-standard.

questions.explanation: ATA = PDA per (owner, mint) pair = wallet standard.
